title: Get All Activity Types
description: Retrieves a list of all valid Fitbit public activities and the private, user-created activities from the Fitbit activities database in the format requested. If available, activity level details will display.

response_fields.name: categories : activities : activityLevels : id
response_fields.description: Numerical value representing the corresponding activity level.

response_fields.name: categories : activities : activityLevels : maxSpeedMPH
response_fields.description: Maximum speed in MPH. Value: -1 means not applicable.

response_fields.name: categories : activities : activityLevels : mets
response_fields.description: METs score for the activity id.

response_fields.name: categories : activities : activityLevels : minSpeedMPH
response_fields.description: Minimum speed in MPH. Value: -1 means not applicable.

response_fields.name: categories : activities : id
response_fields.description: Numerical value representing the corresponding activity.

response_fields.name: categories : activities : name
response_fields.description: The name of the activity or exercise.
